# stripe_v2_billing_pricing_plan (Resource)

A Pricing Plan represents a bundled collection of billing components that define how customers are charged. Each plan can include multiple components such as Rate Cards for usage-based pricing, License Fees for recurring charges, and Service Actions for recurring credit grants. After creating a Pricing Plan, you can subscribe customers to it by creating a Pricing Plan Subscription.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `currency` (String) The currency of the PricingPlan.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the PricingPlan. Maximum 250 characters.
- `tax_behavior` (String) The Stripe Tax tax behavior - whether the PricingPlan is inclusive or exclusive of tax.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of pricing plan subscription.
- `lookup_key` (String) An internal key you can use to search for a particular PricingPlan. Maximum length of 200 characters.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of [key-value pairs](/docs/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the PricingPlan is active.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `latest_version` (String) The ID of the latest version of the PricingPlan.
- `live_version` (String) The ID of the live version of the PricingPlan.
